title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. Space exploration, astronauts, relativity, black holes, and the future of Earth.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O. Mind games, dream worlds, subconscious, heist, and psychological thriller.

title: The Matrix
synopsis: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence. Cyberpunk, virtual reality, artificial intelligence, simulation, and rebellion.

title: Stranger Things
synopsis: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces and one strange little girl. Retro eighties, telekinesis, parallel dimensions, monsters, and group of kids adventure.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts. Japanese folklore, magical creatures, fantasy realm, and coming of age.

title: Blade Runner 2049
synopsis: A new blade runner, LAPD Officer K, unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos. Replicants, dystopian future, cyberpunk, noir detective, artificial intelligence, and corporate control.

title: Gladiator
synopsis: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery. Ancient Rome, gladiatorial combat, revenge, honor, politics, and military battles.
